title: Day-arc continuity captures commit window opening
body: Opening commit-window claim b8817031 for day-arc continuity captures: napkin three new entries (sonarqube tooling / rush-impulse metacognition / markdown shared-state collision-safety), pending-graduations register (fast-path withdrawal + three new candidates: rush-impulse / markdown-collision-safety / thread-hygiene), repo-continuity + thread record updates, new experience file. Pathspec: 4 modified .agent files + 1 new experience file. Quarantine dir excluded (peer WIP). Peer-claim scan: registry empty pre-claim.
